case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. SAIRA IVY MEJIA QUINONEZ

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-26-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-26-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF'S REPRESENTATIVE MARIA SUZANNA BARRAZA-SALAS, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST AT OPORTUN, INC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT SAIRA IVY MEJIA QUINONEZ. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE.
